gold_lean:
/-- Hex: 1d6 Necrotic per attack roll hit, concentration.
    Bug: Hex damage doubled on critical hits from targets with Armour of Agathys -/
axiom hex_crit_bug
    (gs : GameState) (hexedTarget caster : EntityId) :
    (gs.getEntity hexedTarget).isSome →
    (gs.getEntity hexedTarget).get!.hasCondition .hexed →
    -- On crit, Hex damage is erroneously doubled
    True
